value.stringValue: Pay Profile has been reinstated succesfully
An error has occurred, please try again. If the problem occurs again contact IT

fields.name: Text
fields.fieldText:
This process will remove payroll related information, lapse all current certifications and automatically invite the candidate to re-register. Any candidate without an in date passport that has been digitally checked will be required to submit a new PORTW.

﻿

fields.name: Text_0
fields.fieldText: As you have been issued with a P45, there is some information we need from you before you can start working with us again. Please click below to provide us with the documentation we need to re-register you. Once competed you will be able to Find Work and apply for available shifts in your area.
